ZAKIWhy ZAKIContactGet started
Experimental public beta

Most AI forgets you. ZAKI doesn't.

ZAKI is persistent AI with memory and continuity. It keeps the thread with you instead of starting over every session. When the work needs its own instructions, documents, and clean context, you move into Spaces.

Public marketing for ZAKI is 5 free messages per day during beta. Spaces remain the live paid workspace layer at $13/month.

Try ZAKI freeSee ZAKI vs SpacesStart with Spaces

Free beta

5 msgs / day

State

Public beta

Best for

Ongoing threads

Works with

Spaces

personal operator / trainable beta

What it is

Persistent AI with memory and continuity. ZAKI keeps your thread alive across sessions so you do not have to restate yourself every time.

How it works with Spaces

ZAKI handles the continuity layer and the long-running relationship. When the job turns into writing, research, or organized execution, you move into Spaces so each project keeps its own clean context.

Why it is experimental

ZAKI is experimental by design. It is the public beta for persistent AI with memory and continuity, not a finished autonomous product.

What this includes

  • Persistent thread with memory and recall
  • Visible process phases while it works
  • Built for an ongoing relationship, not one-off prompts
  • Public beta with 5 free messages per day
  • 5 free messages per day

Powered by Nullalis

Nullalis is the private runtime behind ZAKI. It gives the product continuity, memory discipline, and agentic capability without turning the public product into a fragile demo.

Persistent per-user sessions
Durable memory and runtime state
Process visibility through live streaming updates
Multitenant safety, trainability, and deployment discipline

Early access

Try ZAKI during beta

The beta includes 5 free messages per day while we learn what works. If you need a structured workspace today, the paid Spaces layer is already live.

5 free messages / dayWe use this only to contact you about ZAKI beta access.
